titleStmt.title: SII 9.579: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 579. (A.R. No. 69 of 1912.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE PRAKARA OF THE LAKSHMIDEVI TEMPLE AT GORREPALLE, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1459, Hēmaḷambi, Chaitra, śu. 15, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1537 March 26, Monday, in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Vīraṇa-Nāyaka, brother of Penugoṇḍe Virapaṇṇayya, son of Lēpākshi Nandi-Lakiseṭṭi and Muddamāmbā, made a gift for the service of the goddess Mahālakshmīdēvi, of Lakkhaṇāpura, of the kāṇike, gold and clothes, offered by devotees of various countries to the goddess, on festival and other days.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśaka
varuṣaṁgaḷu 1459 neya hēmaḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada
caitra śu 15 sōmavāradalū . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rā
japaramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīaccutadēvamahā
rāyaru paithvīrājyaṁgaivuttaṁ yiralū . lēpākṣi naṁdi
lakiśeṭṭi muddamāṁbā varakumāra penugoṁḍe virapaṁṇayya
navara taṁmaṁdiru vīraṇanāyakarū penugoṁḍerājya ha
ruhesthaḷada lakhkhaṇāpurada mahālakṣmidēviA(ṁ)mmanavara
prativaruṣa caitra śudha paurnna�vo tīrthadivasagaḷalli
yū pratidivasagaḷalliyū nānādēśa nānārājya
nānāgrāmagaḷa paruṣeyavaru sa
marpisuvaṁthā kāṇike rokha vastra bhaṁgāra muṁttāda sa
masta vastugaḷa kāṇikeyanū I dēvarige dhūpa dīpa
Amrutapaḍi naivēdya nrutya gīta vādya muṁttāda vaibha
vaṁgaḷige I vīraṇanāyakarū sahira(ṁ)ṇyōda
kadānadhārāpūrvakavāgi Ācaṁ
drārkasthāyi Āgi dhāreya
neradu koṭṭa prativaruṣa rathōtsava tīrthadivasagaḷa pratidi
vasagaḷa kāṇikeya sarvādāyada dharmaśāsana
dānapālanayōrmadhyēdānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāt
svargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.579 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
